item.title: About me
item.description: I am passionate about mathematics and its applications to physics and computer science. I recently finished my MSc Degree in Mathematics at Instituto Superior Técnico, University of Lisbon, under the supervision of John Huerta, and I am currently looking for a PhD position. Contact me at: email: rui at ruimp.com github: github.com/ruimp linkedin: linkedin.com/in/ruimpxt Research Interests derived geometry operads and higher strucutres factorization algebras homotopy Lie algebras supergeometry (shifted) Poisson geometry (topological) quantum field theory Education Master of Science in Applied Mathematics and Computation - IST, Lisbon Thesis : Vertex Superalgebras from Prefactorization Algebras

item.title: On the hunt
item.description: I have recently completed my Master of Science Degree in Mathematics at Instituto Superior Técnico, University of Lisbon. I am happy to report that my thesis Vertex Superalgebras from Prefactorization Algebras earned the maximum possible grade of 20/20. I am now applying to PhD positions! You can read more about my interests here. Feel free to reach out regarding possible PhD projects.

item.title: Welcome!
item.description: Welcome to my personal website! My name is Rui Peixoto. I am interested in mathematics and its applications to physics and computer science. You can read more about me or contact me at rmp at ruimp.com. I am always happy to discuss anything math and science. On the hunt I have recently completed my Master of Science Degree in Mathematics at IST, University of Lisbon. I am happy to report that my thesis Vertex Superalgebras from Prefactorization Algebras earned the maximum possible grade of 20/20.
